    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class jogo.Launcher
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class jogo.Main
    Standard Java main method used as a fallback mechanism to trigger the underlying JavaFX runtime launch sequence.
    Main - Class in jogo
    The main entry point for the JavaFX application.
    Main() - Constructor for class jogo.Main
     
    MainGameScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    The primary gameplay interface controller and view dashboard.
    MainGameScreen(Stage, GameSession) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.MainGameScreen
     
    MainGameScreen(Stage, GameSession, String) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.MainGameScreen
     
    MAINTENANCE_MATERIAL - Variable in class jogo.models.Structures.Structures
     
    MapCellScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    Controller and view class that handles the contextual action menu for a selected map tile.
    MapCellScreen(Stage, GameSession, int, int, Runnable) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.MapCellScreen
    Constructs a new MapCellScreen context bound to a target grid tile location.
    Mine - Class in jogo.models.Structures
    Represents a Mine structure in the game world.
    Mine(Player, int) - Constructor for class jogo.models.Structures.Mine
    Constructs a new Mine structure, initializing its base operating yields, building prerequisites, and assigning it to the purchasing player.
    MINE - Enum constant in enum class jogo.models.Structures.StructuresType
    Represents an extraction site tailored for quarrying stone materials.
    MineTest - Class in models.Structures
    Test class for the Mine class.
    MineTest() - Constructor for class models.Structures.MineTest
